typography.heading_strategy: Elegant, generous line-height, sophisticated letter-spacing. Use tracking-tight on massive text (6xl) and tracking-[0.2em] on tiny overlines.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-serif font-semibold tracking-tight leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-serif font-semibold leading-tight
hierarchy.overline: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-sans font-medium text-secondary

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use large padding (p-12 to p-32) to let the typography and imagery breathe.
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm for subtle edges (luxury avoids heavy rounding)

components_strategy.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary: bg-secondary text-white hover:bg-secondary_hover. Secondary: border border-secondary text-secondary hover:bg-secondary/10. Include an arrow or smooth transition.
components_strategy.cards: Cardless or pure flat. 1px solid borders in low opacity (border-white/10 for dark mode).
components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn customized for sharp luxury. bg-transparent, bottom border only, or solid 1px border. No heavy shadows.
components_strategy.navigation: Glassmorphism if scrolling over image (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background_light/80), or solid Dark Green background.
components_strategy.footer: Massive padding (py-24), dark background (#0A0A0A), large brand typography.

Home.layout: Hero (Dark) -> Benefits Bento -> Ingredients Showcase -> Testimonials -> Featured Products -> Footer
Home.specifics: Hero uses dark moody forest image, large product bottle (using the label), gold accents.

Product (1 Vajra).layout: Sticky Product Info / Gallery -> Deep Dive Ingredients -> Ayurveda Ritual Story -> Trust Badges (FSSAI/GMP)
Product (1 Vajra).specifics: Use split layout (sticky right side, scrollable left side images).

pages.Shop: Grid layout, large images, minimal text. Filter sidebar.
pages.Cart & Checkout: Shadcn drawer for Cart. Clean, distraction-free Checkout with WhatsApp CTA.
pages.About: Editorial layout, founder story, legacy of Dharmaraj Ayurveda.
pages.Contact: Split layout: Image on left, minimal contact form on right. WhatsApp button prominent.
pages.Blog: Masonry or Bento grid of articles with elegant serif titles.
pages.FAQ: Shadcn Accordion, elegant styling, no borders, just underline separators.

ingredients.description: Raw spices and herbs dark background

interactive_and_motion.hover: Smooth color transitions, slight scale up on images (1.05) with 0.6s ease-out.
interactive_and_motion.scroll: Fade up and staggered entrance using Framer Motion. Smooth scroll (Lenis) recommended.
interactive_and_motion.overlays: Hero overlay: max bg-black/40 or gradient-to-b from-black/60 to-transparent.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast or text-shadow.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. E.g. data-testid='add-to-cart-button'

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette: deep green, obsidian, and rich gold.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layout wrappers, bento grids, and hero sections. Do not use Shadcn 'Card' for structural layout.
Install and use 'Cormorant Garamond' (headings) and 'Outfit' (body) via Google Fonts.
Product presentation must feel like high-end luxury, similar to Forest Essentials or Vahdam.
Implement WhatsApp CTAs as primary action buttons alongside Add to Cart.
All components must be .js files, not .tsx. Adjust Shadcn installation if necessary to output Javascript.
Use data-testid on every clickable item.
Incorporate the provided logo and product label assets prominently.
